scripts.cap:android: vite build && cap sync android && cap open android
scripts.cap:ios: vite build && cap sync ios && cap open ios
scripts.android:run: vite build && cap sync android && cap run android
scripts.android:build-apk: vite build && cap sync android && cd android && gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.android:build-aab: vite build && cap sync android && cd android && gradlew bundleRelease
